svg.title: Accessibility Research: Financial Inclusion Study
svg.desc: Illustration showing accessibility barriers in financial products and solutions for inclusive design

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about visual impairment barriers in fintech')
sendPrompt('Tell me about motor impairment barriers')
sendPrompt('How do alt text and screen readers help?')
sendPrompt('How do larger touch targets help?')
sendPrompt('How do captions help deaf users?')
